text:
benefit phases 
depend on specific dollar amounts and often do not split exactly between prescription fills; that is, a 
particular PDE may “straddle” more than one benefit phase. For example, “DD” indicates that the 
beneficiary was in the deductible phase of the benefit both before and after filling the prescription, 
but “PI” indicates that this PDE occurred partly in the pre-ICL phase and partly in the coverage gap. 

SHORT NAME: BNFTPHAS 

LONG NAME: BENEFIT_PHASE 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2
